corrections.description: Article starts with Relief Society Conference content instead of the story beginning
corrections.text: The howling wind made the tall old house rock and creak.

corrections.description: Article contains content from 'Heart Room for Home' at the beginning, need to trim to start of actual 'Mama and the Magic Bag' story
corrections.text: Time picked up momentum as the weeks passed. Mary Ann, beleaguered with wedding plans, had little time to worry about her father-in-law beyond his meals and clean clothes, and nobody else did.
